section.title: One-page formula summary

md.mrow: \boxed{ax^2+2bxy+cy^2 = \begin{pmatrix}x\amp y\end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} a\amp b\\ b\amp c \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} x\\ y \end{pmatrix}}
\boxed{A\text{ positive definite} \Longleftrightarrow \mathbf x^T A\mathbf x\gt 0 \text{ for every }\mathbf x\ne\mathbf 0}
\boxed{ \begin{array}{c|c} D\gt 0,\ f_{xx}\gt 0 \amp \text{local minimum}\\ D\gt 0,\ f_{xx}\lt 0 \amp \text{local maximum}\\ D\lt 0 \amp \text{saddle}\\ D=0 \amp \text{inconclusive} \end{array} }
